hero.headline: TFT Community & Tournaments.
hero.subheadline: More than boosting. I'm building a community where players connect, tournaments are organized, and boosters have a professional platform.

about.title: Why I Do This
about.p1: I'm ngusitink — the person behind Tacticianclimb. My goal is to create a hub dedicated to the TFT community.
about.p2: This is a place for everyone to connect, learn, and especially a playground for organizing professional as well as community tournaments.
about.p3: More importantly, this system provides each booster a unique profile. You can fully customize this page to your liking, turning it into a professional personal portfolio to attract clients.
about.p4: Whether you're a booster wanting to build your personal brand, or a player wanting to join exciting tournaments, Tacticianclimb is for you.

comparison.title: What Makes Us Different
comparison.subtitle: Gone are the days of anonymous services that just take your money. Tacticianclimb puts the power back in your hands.

why.title: Why Choose Tacticianclimb
why.subtitle: Not just boosting — this is an ecosystem

community.title: Connect & Tournaments
community.description: Discord server is the community hub. Discuss meta, learn from high elo players, and sign up for regular tournaments.

external.title: Create Your Own Portfolio
external.description: Every booster partner gets their own profile page. You can fully customize the layout, gallery, reviews to create an impressive portfolio.
